user.title: Connect to Teletask Central Unit
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Teletask central unit.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your Teletask central unit.
data_description.port: TCP port of the central unit — default is {default_port}.
data_description.central_id: A unique name to identify this central unit, e.g. my_teletask.

config.title: Teletask Component Configuration
config.description:
Enter the path to your config.json file on the Home Assistant server.

Example: `{example_path}`

Relative paths are resolved from `/config/`. The file must be inside your `/config/` directory.

data_description.config_file_path: Full or relative path to your Teletask config.json file, e.g. /config/teletask/config.json

error.cannot_resolve: Hostname could not be resolved. Check that the hostname is correct and your DNS is working.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Teletask central unit. Check the hostname or IP address and port.
error.file_not_found: File not found. Make sure the path is correct and the file exists.
error.invalid_json: The file does not contain valid JSON. Please check the file content.
error.cannot_read_file: Could not read the file. Check file permissions.
error.path_outside_config: For security reasons, the file must be inside the /config/ directory.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Teletask central unit is already configured.

init.title: Update Teletask Configuration
init.description:
Point to a new or updated config.json file.

Example: `{example_path}`
